series_metadata.series_description: Includes all internal correspondence (letters, memos) not directly related to an agency project or not addressed by other sections of the agency''s records retention schedules and is informative by nature and does not attempt to influence agency policy. Also includes correspondence or inquiries from other agencies, individuals, companies, or organizations requesting information pertaining to the OFCC, and any other miscellaneous inquiry.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: six months, or no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: six months, or no longer of administrative value
